summary: Implement local batch auto-run and balance dashboard evidence
acceptance_criteria: A local deterministic batch auto-run command runs multiple Alpha scenarios/seeds and records bounded balance metrics for victory paths, AI collapses, succession crises, diplomacy outcomes, economy pressure, war/postwar losses, and no-rescue completion.
A local balance dashboard reads generated artifacts and presents aggregate trends without remote telemetry, accounts, paid services, servers, hidden personal data, or production analytics.
Batch outputs are reproducible, schema-versioned, small enough for CI/local evidence, and do not become authoritative WorldState or save payloads.
Balance evidence identifies P0/P1 candidates and tuning risks without automatically changing content or simulation rules.
required_tests: Batch auto-run smoke covers at least three scenarios, multiple deterministic seeds, schema validation, and dashboard rendering of generated local artifacts.
notes: This is local Alpha balance evidence, not telemetry or live analytics.
Do not add remote services, accounts, secrets, runtime SQL databases, ORMs, or paid APIs.
Dashboard UI must stay read-only over generated artifacts.
